productDisplayName: Skechers Women Ever Lasting Black Sandals
description: Stylish and uber cool, these Ever-lasting slip-ons from the Tone-ups colletion of skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a simple strappy design in attractive colors, these sandals are designed to activate your calf, thigh and buttock muscles. Look super stylish in these comfortable sandals all day long. Upper Wide synthetic straps in a simple T-strap design for extra comfort with crystal discs Fabric lining for added comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for all day comfort Outsole Outsole designed to create instability with every step and therefore activate underused muscles to maintain balance Rubber outsole with brand name grooves provides traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
